note: Grouped per technique so each comparison is coherent (identical workload, languages ranked). AEAD/hash are each language's native-maximum stack. PQC has ~no native per-language implementations, so it is measured on the real distinct backends (OpenSSL 3.6.3 EVP, liboqs, Go native crypto/mlkem); any language reaches the OpenSSL/liboqs numbers via FFI at ~the same cost.
